channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Falcons name rookie Michael Penix Jr. as starting QB, benching veteran Kirk Cousins
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — The Atlanta Falcons are turning to rookie Michael Penix Jr. as their starting quarterback and benching veteran Kirk Cousins as they fight for their first playoff berth since 2017. Coach Raheem Morris announced the decision in a statement Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Radio legend Mike Francesa says government has taken 'cavalier approach' to mysterious NJ drones
item.description: New York radio legend Mike Francesa says the government has taken a "cavalier approach" with the mysterious drones that have flown over New York.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lions have been hit hardest by rash of injuries, though NFL says overall amount has decreased
item.description: On Football analyzes the biggest topics in the NFL from week to week. For more On Football analysis, head here. ___ Patrick Mahomes is battling another ankle injury. Josh Allen has a banged-up shoulder. Geno Smith is dealing with a knee issue. Those are just the quarterbacks who got hurt in Week 15.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Conor McGregor says he has 'agreed' to box Logan Paul; WWE star gives cryptic message
item.description: UFC fighter Conor McGregor said he has "agreed" to fight Logan Paul in an "exhibition" boxing match in India, and Paul seems to be on board with it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Dodgers MVP heading to New York Yankees: report
item.description: The New York Yankees agreed to acquire outfielder Cody Bellinger from the Chicago Cubs on Tuesday for right-hander Cody Poteet, a person familiar with the negotiations told The Associated Press. The person spoke to the AP on condition of anonymity because the trade had not been announced.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: X Games leaving SoCal, headed up north
item.description: After two years, the X Games are leaving Southern California. Back in November, the extreme sports competition announced it wasn't going to return to Ventura but kept its future home under wraps. Now they've finally revealed the games are moving to Sacramento.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: MLB study: Max velocity, ‘stuff’ likely causing pitching injuries; rule changes should be considered
item.description: The 62-page report released Tuesday said the trends extended to high school and youth baseball because of the incentive to get noticed by professional scouts. The study said there is no evidence linking the pitch clock to injuries.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA announces All-Star tournament plan for this season: 4 teams, 3 games, 1 night
item.description: The NBA’s All-Star Game is going to be an All-Star tournament this season, with the league announcing that it has finalized plans to use a different format for the upcoming midseason showcase in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: NFL legend gives 49ers star Deebo Samuel hard truth about dropped balls
item.description: Pro Football Hall of Famer Jerry Rice was critical of Deebo Samuel after the San Francisco 49ers star had a tough outing following his social media outburst.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 49ers suspend De'Vondre Campbell for 3 games
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco 49ers have suspended linebacker De'Vondre Campbell after he refused to play in Thursday’s game against the Los Angeles Rams, General Manager John Lynch announced Monday. The suspension is for the team's final three games of the season.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: Report: Notre Dame and football HC Marcus Freeman agree to long-term extension
item.description: Notre Dame University and football head coach Marcus Freeman have agreed to a long-term contract extension, effectively ending any speculation about him being considered for the Chicago Bears head coaching job.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Freddie Freeman's walk-off grand slam ball sells for $1.56 million at auction
item.description: Freddie Freeman’s historic walk-off grand slam ball from Game 1 of the World Series has sold for $1.56 million at auction.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Trump, close allies attend Army-Navy rivalry game
item.description: As national concerns about the drones spotted on the East Coast continue to mount, President-elect Trump is attending the Army-Navy game.
item.dc:creator: The Hill Staff, NewsNation

item.title: Duke lacrosse players' rape accuser admits she lied
item.description: The former exotic dancer confessed to lying about the encounter in 2006 during her appearance on the “Let’s Talk with Kat” podcast.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, NewsNation

item.title: Bucs' run game faced with challenging front seven
item.description: Quarterback Baker Mayfield is faced with a challenging Chargers defense that is allowing the fewest points in the NFL. The Chargers are led by the edge-rush combo of Joey Bosa and Khalil Mack.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 29 CMU football student-athletes make RMAC All-Academic list
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference unveiled its All-Academic Team for football on Tuesday afternoon. Colorado Mesa University was well-represented, with 29 student-athletes receiving recognition, including five First Team honorees and one major award winner.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: FIFA confirms Saudi Arabia as 2034 World Cup host despite human rights concerns
item.description: ZURICH (AP) — Saudi Arabia was officially confirmed Wednesday by FIFA as host of the 2034 World Cup in men’s soccer, giving the oil-rich kingdom its biggest prize yet for massive spending on global sports driven by Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KTLA 5
